projectDescription: A Python implementation of the classic 2048 sliding tile puzzle game, available as both a Tkinter desktop app and a Flask-powered web application.
keyFeatures: Tkinter desktop GUI with colored tile display
Flask web application with REST API backend
Keyboard controls via arrow keys and WASD
Game over detection with replay option
Dynamic tile color mapping based on tile value
publicApiSurface: POST /move — Move tiles in a direction (left, right, up, down)
POST /reset — Reset the game to initial state
GET / — Serve the web game interface
Game2048.game_over() — Check if no moves remain
Game2048.add_new_tile() — Spawn a new 2 or 4 tile
